things.name: Taipei 101 Observatory
things.description: World's tallest building 2004-2010 — the indoor and outdoor observation decks on the 89th/91st floors are unmissable

things.name: National Palace Museum
things.description: One of the world's greatest museums — 700,000 Chinese artefacts, including the Jadeite Cabbage and Meat-shaped Stone

things.name: Jiufen Old Street
things.description: Hillside tea-house village that inspired Spirited Away — lantern-lit stairs and ocean views at dusk

things.name: Shilin Night Market
things.description: Taipei's most famous night market — stinky tofu, oyster omelettes, bubble tea and street games

things.name: Chiang Kai-shek Memorial Hall
things.description: Imposing white marble monument with changing of the guard ceremony and surrounding garden park

things.name: Elephant Mountain Hike (Xiangshan)
things.description: 45-minute hike to the iconic viewpoint with the classic Taipei 101 backdrop photo

things.name: Longshan Temple
things.description: Taipei's oldest and most ornate Buddhist-Taoist temple (1738) — incense-filled with colourful deity statues

things.name: Beitou Hot Springs
things.description: Natural hot spring district in the north of Taipei — public pools, traditional ryokans and the hot spring museum

things.name: Taroko Gorge Day Trip
things.description: Taiwan's most dramatic natural wonder — marble gorge with suspension bridges (2-hour train from Taipei)

things.name: Din Tai Fung Dumplings
things.description: The world's most famous soup dumpling restaurant — Michelin-starred xiaolongbao at the Xinyi flagship
